enumeration_literals.name: Rc
enumeration_literals.description: External 32KiHz crystal oscillator running and generating the LFCLK clock.

enumeration_literals.name: Xtal
enumeration_literals.description:

clock.

enumeration_literals.description: 16MHz xtal is used as source for the HFCLK oscillator.

record_types.name: CLOCK_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_LFCLKSTOP
fields.description: Start calibration of LFCLK RC oscillator.

fields.name: EVENTS_LFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Calibration of LFCLK RC oscillator completed.

fields.name: LFCLKSTAT
fields.description:
Clock source for the LFCLK clock, set when task LKCLKSTART is
triggered.

fields.name: LFCLKSRCCOPY
fields.description: Clock source for the LFCLK clock.
